title: Audio-to-Text & Speech-to-Speech Architecture
description: Implement audio-to-text and speech-to-speech architectures utilizing Whisper and specialized TTS models. Build real-time, low-latency voice agents with emotional nuance.
objectives: Implement audio-to-text and speech-to-speech architectures utilizing Whisper and specialized TTS models.
Build real-time, low-latency voice agents with emotional nuance.
